title: Xi asks Trump if U.S. and China can avoid 'Thucydides Trap' at high-stakes summit
summary_full: U.S. President Donald Trump met Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing on Thursday morning for the start of a high-stakes summit that runs through Friday.
summary_public: U.S. President Donald Trump met Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing on Thursday morning for the start of a high-stakes summit that runs through Friday.
